/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libqcap2.demuxer.so -o lib/libqcap2.demuxer.so CMakeFiles/qcap2_demuxer.dir/src/qcap2.demuxer.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN" lib/libqcap2.devices.so lib/libqcap2.processing.so lib/libqcap2.sync.so lib/libqcap2.formats.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavformat.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavcodec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavutil.so lib/libqcap2.buffer.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libswresample.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libswscale.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavfilter.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavcodec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavutil.so
